title: The Binding of Isaac Tunes!
description: A The Binding of Isaac music pack!
body:
Immerse yourself in **_The Binding of Isaac soundtracks_** while exploring your Minecraft world!

This resource pack replaces Minecraft's default music with tracks from **_The Binding of Isaac_**, including the original *Flash* version, *Rebirth*, its expansions (*Afterbirth*, *Afterbirth+*, *Repentance*), and community mods like *Antibirth* and works by **RENREN** and **pittsbourne**.

**Compatible with Minecraft 1.19 to 1.21**

## 🎵 Credits
- **Danny Baranowsky** – Composer of the iconic *The Binding of Isaac* (Flash) soundtrack.
- **C418** – Composer of *"Antempause"* in *The Binding of Isaac* (Flash).
- **Ridiculon** – Creators of the music for *Rebirth* and its expansions.
- **Mudeth** – Composer of the unforgettable *Antibirth* themes.
- **RENREN** – Creator of [Excelsior](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2701118263), featuring *Rebirth*-inspired compositions.
- **pittsbourne** – Creator of [Reroll Your Soundtrack (RYS)](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2805335845), featuring *Rebirth*-inspired compositions.
- **Splattie** – Creator of [Rescored: Beats To Repent To](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2521411460), an original alternate *Rebirth* soundtrack.
